verses.1: This is the blessing with which Moses the man of God blessed the children of Israel before his death.
verses.7: This is for Judah. He said,
verses.9: He said of his father, and of his mother, ‘I have not seen him.’
verses.10: They shall teach Jacob your ordinances,
verses.14: for the precious things of the fruits of the sun,
verses.15: for the best things of the ancient mountains,
verses.16: for the precious things of the earth and its fullness,
verses.17: Majesty belongs to the firstborn of his herd.
verses.19: They will call the peoples to the mountain.
verses.21: He provided the first part for himself,
verses.25: Your bars will be iron and bronze.
verses.26: “There is no one like God, Jeshurun,
verses.27: The eternal God is your dwelling place.
